title: OREGON RECOVERY RESIDENCES - 211info
text: MENTAL HEALTH AND ADDICTION CERTIFICATION BOARD OF OREGON OREGON RECOVERY RESIDENCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides up to date information on recovery housing in Oregon; information is updated by agencies and recovery residence operators. 2209 Lloyd Center Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses Sober Living Homes Transitional Housing/Shelter If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MENTAL HEALTH AND ADDICTION CERTIFICATION BOARD OF OREGON
